Title: Website
Notes: Got an email from Christopher regarding the SSL expired email....The user requested an update for their SSL certificate, which was expiration. So login to the Godday account and download the SSL certificate. I accessed the server as root and upload the certificate....navigated to the ssl.conf  edited to update the paths to the new SSL certificate, private key, and chain file. After saving the changes, I restarted the Apache service with the command sudo systemctl restart httpd to apply the new certificate. The new SSL certificate is now valid until December 21, 2026. The certificate was verified using the SSL Labs SSL Test tool, confirming that it has been successfully updated and is working correctly on the server. No further action is required unless the user encounters issues with the updated certificate.
